PathOfBuilding.Notes:
^x70FF703.26 Notes: Other than the way we acquire Jun's crafts (now from maps instead of farming veiled items), the only thing that has changed in 3.26 are Ralekesh's Impatience boots. For them, we now look for "Endurance Charges count as maximum". Other than that, I changed the bottom cluster for Bleed/Crit to Mark + Frenzy charge gain, but at level 100, the build has both of those!
^xFFFF77WEBSITE ---->^7 ^7^7Https://Heavyheals.com^7 ^xFFFF77<--- WEBSITE^7^7
^xAF6025Watcher's Eye^7^7: https://www.pathofexile.com/trade/search/Settlers/06mW648Ig (+2 impales with pride & phys leech as life with Vitality)
^xFFFF77CRAFTING^7:^7
^x8888FF~if you're confused how the gear should look like, look what i'm currently using in the POB!!!~^7^7^7^7
Essences: ^xD02090 Screaming Essence of Envy^7 (or higher tier if you can afford it!!!) - Chaos Resistance Deafening Essence of ^xB97123Anger^7 / ^x3F6DB3Hated^7 / ^xFFFF77Wrath^7 - Elemental Resistance OR ^xADAA47Deafening Essence of Zeal^7 - Attack speed essence ^xE05030Deafening Essence of Loating^7 (critical strikes) OR ^xAF6025of Scorn^7 (critical multiplier)
Eldritch Currency: ^xB97123Lesser/Greater Eldritch Ember^7 - Searing Exarch Influence (implicit) ^x3F6DB3^x7070FFLesser/Greater Eldritch Ichor^7^7 - Eater of Worlds Influence (implicit) Eldritch Chaos Orb
^xFFFF77WEBSITE ---->^7 ^7Https://Heavyheals.com^7 ^xFFFF77<--- WEBSITE^7^7 ITEMS:
^xFFFF77DISCLAIMER -> HELMET / BODY ARMOUR / GLOVES NEED TO HAVE DIFFERENT RESISTANCES THAT ARE FRACTURED!!!!!!!^7
^xD02090Helmet^7 - We start with "Haunted Bascinet" helmet with 1 fractured elemental resistance of choosing (pay attention that you need to have all ele res at at least 75%!) ^xD02090^xAF6025Link to trade^7:^7 https://www.pathofexile.com/trade/search/Settlers/wqwXMZ9tb Once you get the item, you want to hit it with at least ^xD02090Screaming Essence of Envy (chaos resistance) ^7until you get T1 (13 or 14%) Chance to suppress spell damage!!! This may take a while as Suppress is a rarer modifier to get! Once you get T1 Suppress, then you want to check for prefixes and you want as much life, armor and evasion as you can get! If you do not have that much (which means T4 or lower), you can use one ^xB97123Lesser/Greater Eldritch Ember^7^7 and then hit the item with ^xAF6025Eldritch Chaos Orb^7^7 as that will then change prefixes on the item (as long as ^xB97123Searing Exarch^7 influence is higher than ^x7070FFEater of Worlds^7! Greater > lesser etc!!!). Once you have two (or three) prefixes and you're happy with them, last prefixes can be a craft for more life and/or more armor/evasion! ^x70FF70Implicits^7: You want to hit the item with ^xB97123Greater Eldritch Ember^7 to get Reduced Mana Cost of Attacks and with ^x7070FFGreater Eldritch Ichor^7 to get 8% Increased Mana Reservation Efficiency! (You can change the values of implicits in brackets via "Blessed Orb")
^xD02090Body Armour^7 - We start with "Conquest Lamellar" body armour with 1 fractured elemental resistance of choosing (pay attention that you need to have all ele res at at least 75%!) ^xAF6025Link to Trade^7: https://www.pathofexile.com/trade/search/Settlers/wqwX7PmSb Very similar to Helmet, we use at least ^xD02090Screaming Essence of Envy (chaos resistance)^7 until we get T1 (20-22%) Chance to Suppress Spell Damage!!! Once again, this can take a while as suppress is decently rare! Once you get T1 Suppress, then you want to check for prefixes and you want AS MUCH ARMOR AND EVASION as possible (^xD02090if you do not have life, you can pick "15% increased maximum life if there are no life modifiers on equipped body armour" Life mastery!!!^7) - I do not recommend under T4 for those mods. If you're not satisfied with the prefixes, you can use one ^xB97123Lesser/Greater Eldritch Ember^7^7^7 and then hit the item with ^xAF6025Eldritch Chaos Orb^7^7 until you're satisfied with prefixes (this can be armor/evasion + life or just armor etc). ^xFFFF77WE NEED ONE EMPTY PREFIX ON THE CHEST FOR THE CRAFT!!!!^7 -> Empty prefix craft is "^xFFFF77Chance to avoid elemental ailments and chance to avoid being stunned^7". We need 25% chance to avoid elemental ailments here! (6 orbs of alchemy + 1 orb of scouring per craft!) ^x70FF70Implicits^7: You want to hit the item with ^xB97123Greater Eldritch Ember^7 to get "Increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills" and with ^x7070FFGreater Eldritch Ichor^7 to get "Determination has increased aura effect". You can also instead of Determination go with "Pride has increased aura effect" for more damage. I chose the defensive option!
^xD02090Gloves^7 - We start with "Wyvernscale Gloves" gloves with 1 fractured elemental resistance of choosing (pay attention that you need to have all ele res at at least 75%!) ^xAF6025Link to Trade^7: https://www.pathofexile.com/trade/search/Settlers/9vWpP7QCK Similar to both helmet and body armour, we need to look for T1 Spell Suppress Chance (13-14%), but this time we use EITHER ^xFFFF77Deafening essence of^7 ^x3F6DB3Hatred^7/^xB97123Anger^7/^xADAA47Wrath^7 OR ^xADAA47Deafening Essence of Zeal^7. First 3 give us a T1 elemental resistance suffix, second one gives us attack speed. Both methods are the same, I crafted with Zeal once i had enough resistances to spare!!! Once you've crafted the suffixes (T1 spell suppress!) then on prefixes we look for life, armor/evasion or physical damage to attacks. Whichever combination you get, as long as you have one prefix to spare, is good! If the tiers are low (T4 and lower) or if you get something completely useless (like elemental damage etc), use the method with ^xAF6025Eldritch Chaos Orb^7 to change the prefixes as mentioned above. Once done, go to crafting bench and on the empty prefix you want to craft "Increased damage while leeching" for 1 Exalted Orb. ^x70FF70Implicits^7: Hit the item with ^xB97123Greater Eldritch Ember^7^7 to get "9% increased attack speed" and ^x7070FFGreater Eldritch Ichor^7 to get "+6% chance to suppress spell damage"
^xE05030Gloves craft (YT Short)^7: https://youtube.com/shorts/0WH5iNHo0Ho
^xFFFF77DISCLAIMER ->>> WE NEED (at least) 110% CHANCE TO SUPPRESS SPELL DAMAGE BECAUSE OF ANCESTRAL VISION. THIS IS TO GET FULLY AILMENT IMMUNE!!!^7 [if you have T1 suppress yet don't have 110% chance to suppress spell damage, you can use a divine orb to re-roll the number values on items - good luck!]
^xFFFF77Amulet^7 - We start with "Agate Amulet" as that one gives us Strength and Intelligence that we need for the build. We also need fractured "To all Attributes" ^xAF6025Link to Trade^7: https://www.pathofexile.com/trade/search/Settlers/3zbRQ9Zs5 Once you get the amulet, we either use ^xE05030Essence of Loathing^7 or ^xAF6025Essence of Scorn^7 ^xFFFF77[^xD02090SCORN IS USUALLY 3X MORE EXPENSIVE TO DO, YOU HAVE BEEN WARNED!!!!^7^xFFFF77]^7 We need to get T1 "To all elemental resistances" which may take a while. Unfortunately, what you get for prefixes (for cheap) is what you use and what I used in the end. Best thing would be to get life and/or physical damage to attacks +1 empty prefix. If you do not get it and get 3 full prefixes, you can try to use "^x8888FFOrb of Annulment^7" to lose a prefix but it can brick the item by removing a suffix. This is the best gamble you have to open up a prefix slot, but if you got life and something else that is useful, leave it. If you have a free prefix slot, then craft either life, "non-channeling skills have -7 to total mana cost" or another "increased damage while leeching". In my build, I went with the cheapest option and didn't bother to re-craft!
^x70FF70RINGS^7 - Both rings are there to fill in our resistances as much as possible and best rings would be: Prefixes: Life, physical damage to attacks +1 crafted mod / Suffixes: as many resistance mods as possible, including chaos res
IF YOU WANT TO HAVE WHITE SOCKETS ON THE ITEMS, USE OMEN OF BLANCHING (it is rng 1-3 white sockets): https://www.pathofexile.com/trade/search/Settlers/bbv5W7KSL
^x3F6DB3FLASKS^7:^7
For flasks, what we are chasing are, on life flask we want a form of instant recovery (either on low life, partial instant which is 50% instant and 50% over time or full instant flask all the time), but i suggest having "panicked" which is instant recovery on low life as it gives the most recovery from the 3. The suffix is always going to be "cannot be inflicted with bleeding/corrupted blood" and that one can be either rolled or you can use Einhar and Managerie to craft it (Adds "of Sealing"). In regards to unique flasks, we want for all of them the same prefix which is: "x% chance to gain a flask charge when you deal a critical strike" - as we have loads of crit chance, this will boost our flask charges a lot, which makes them usable quite often! For suffixes, you want to match the flask with appropriate suffix: ^xE05030Granite Flask ^7- Armor flask, with "Increased armour during effect" ^x70FF70Jade Flask^7 - Evasion flask, with "Increased evasion during effect" ^x3F6DB3Diamond Flask^7 - Critical strikes flask, with "Increased critical strike chance during effect" ^xAF6025Silver flask^7 - Suffix is whatever you want, however i recommend "Regenerate 3% of life per second during effect" as extra regen feels good!
^xFFFF77WEBSITE ---->^7 ^7Https://Heavyheals.com^7 ^xFFFF77<--- WEBSITE^7^7 ^x7070FFPANTHEON^7:^7^7^7
Major God: Soul of Lunaris / Minor God: Soul of Abberath (if you are doing Searing Exarch) or Soul of Tukohama if you want extra phys dmg reduction
^xFFFF77REGEX^7: SEARCH MANUALLY FOR PHYSICAL REFLECT AS WE ARE NOT IMMUNE!!!!
"!e \d+% r|% to a|eec|tip|gen|uct|s rec|as l|on,"
reduc effect of non-curse auras, less max res, cannot regen (this one is just a hassle to deal with), less recovery (same as regen), no leech, monster crit/multi, monster phys as lightning, avoid poison/impale/bleeding, monster accuracy & players less suppress prevention, less armour, monsters take less dmg from crits & monster phys dmg reduction
^xD02090Streams on Youtube & Twitch: ^7Https://twitch.tv/HeavyHeals^7^7
NOTE: ^xE05030You can find what i'm using on my poe profile her^7^xE05030e^7: https://www.pathofexile.com/account/view-profile/HeavyHeals^7^7
If you have any questions, post them in the youtube comments with "HeavyMLEM" so I know you have at least read these notes!

Skill.label: Dash -> Swap to Leap Slam Later!
War Banner (Helps with Single Target Damage!)
Blood & Sand - Sand stance on Mobs, Blood - Boss!
Blood & Sand - Sand stance on Mobs, Blood - Boss!
War Banner (Helps with Single Target Damage!)
Blood Rage for Attack Speed & Leech
War Banner (Helps with Single Target Damage!)
Blood Rage for Attack Speed & Leech
Blood Rage for Attack Speed & Leech
CWDT - Molten Shell - LEVEL BOTH TO MAX!!!
KEEP ALL LIFETAPS AT LV1 BY RIGHT CLICKING
THEM WHEN PROMPTED TO LEVEL UP!!!!
CWDT - Molten Shell - LEVEL BOTH TO MAX!!!
KEEP ALL LIFETAPS AT LV1 BY RIGHT CLICKING
THEM WHEN PROMPTED TO LEVEL UP!!!!
Auras (4) - Must be Linked with Enlighten!
CWDT - Molten Shell - LEVEL BOTH TO MAX!!!
KEEP ALL LIFETAPS AT LV1 BY RIGHT CLICKING
THEM WHEN PROMPTED TO LEVEL UP!!!!
Auras (5) - Must be linked with Enlighten!
Leave Vitality Aura At Lv1!!! (right click it!)
CWDT - Molten Shell - LEVEL BOTH TO MAX!!!
KEEP ALL LIFETAPS AT LV1 BY RIGHT CLICKING
THEM WHEN PROMPTED TO LEVEL UP!!!!

Items.Item: Rarity: UNIQUE Intuitive Leap Viridian Jewel Unique ID: 42eb9f7c65e5aba6f1cc83880738487b44499762ea0fb014d4a10855c041db29 Item Level: 85 Radius: Small Implicits: 0 Passives in Radius can be Allocated without being connected to your tree ~20-40c jewel Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Entropy Glisten Large Cluster Jewel Unique ID: 23a8c2f271ece08b989ad1706897d65c2590c8bdf47f1ae5485e891a00c1c5e1 Item Level: 83 LevelReq: 40 Implicits: 3 {crafted}Adds 8 Passive Skills {crafted}2 Added Passive Skills are Jewel Sockets {crafted}Added Small Passive Skills grant: 12% increased Damage with Two Handed Weapons Added Small Passive Skills also grant: +2 to Intelligence 1 Added Passive Skill is Feed the Fury 1 Added Passive Skill is Graceful Execution 1 Added Passive Skill is Martial Prowess ~1-2 divine cluster, intelligence is just abonus, it shouldn't be needed!

Rarity: RARE Demon Shelter Haunted Bascinet Armour: 556 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.6173 Evasion: 590 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.6049 Unique ID: 44955675a344f34591f1eb72577c99f302304a9d04faa593cf4712fa5dfedea1 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 8% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills 22% reduced Mana Cost of Attacks {fractured}+46% to Cold Resistance +14% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +75 to Armour +104 to Evasion Rating +24 to maximum Life +24% to Chaos Resistance {crafted}+70 to maximum Life

Rarity: RARE Dusk Shell Conquest Lamellar Armour: 1974 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.3247 Evasion: 1974 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.3247 Unique ID: d7e4cc5d1b4aa693f5b0f4767fa12a37d5a4a1f968b81eb2f702b62cebc217d5 Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-B-R-R-G LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 Determination has 24% increased Aura Effect 12% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills {fractured}+46% to Fire Resistance +21% chance to Suppress Spell Damage 117% increased Armour and Evasion +21% to Chaos Resistance 16% increased Stun and Block Recovery {crafted}25% chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments {crafted}23% chance to Avoid being Stunned

Rarity: UNIQUE Maloney's Mechanism Ornate Quiver Unique ID: 4e774df015453cf0666bf6182a664d3d4c0b8c43ebbd38f8c89590a8310efaaa Item Level: 85 Sockets: R-G G LevelReq: 45 Implicits: 1 Has 1 Socket Has 2 Sockets Trigger a Socketed Bow Skill when you Attack with a Bow, with a 1 second Cooldown 11% increased Attack Speed +55 to maximum Life 5% chance to Blind Enemies on Hit with Attacks

Rarity: RARE Pandemonium Fingers Wyvernscale Gauntlets Armour: 381 ArmourBasePercentile: 0 Evasion: 381 EvasionBasePercentile: 0 Unique ID: 5881c1384929dc79d44eec1f294403ffe07814612d481a39eefd7d7cbff54b8b Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-G B-G LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 +6% chance to Suppress Spell Damage 9% increased Attack Speed {fractured}+46% to Lightning Resistance +13% chance to Suppress Spell Damage 55% increased Armour and Evasion +50 to maximum Life +47% to Fire Resistance {crafted}41% increased Damage while Leeching

Rarity: RARE Horror Idol Agate Amulet Unique ID: aa3c2209a2bae0a3a7c2916ae4c2f858a246739cd13fab21154fcca6a8015b89 Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Frenetic +28 to Strength and Intelligence {fractured}+40 to all Attributes 41% increased Global Critical Strike Chance 30% increased Evasion Rating +30 to maximum Mana +17% to all Elemental Resistances {crafted}+53 to maximum Life

Rarity: RARE Eagle Knot Amethyst Ring Unique ID: b31812cc6eeeaf0059385a7dcdf6372bbe85ebafacb7a6a3e8cd269ae905e512 Item Level: 83 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 1 +23% to Chaos Resistance +61 to maximum Life 22% increased Rarity of Items found +13% to all Elemental Resistances +34% to Fire Resistance +44% to Cold Resistance {crafted}Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost

Rarity: MAGIC Specialist's Granite Flask of the Tortoise Unique ID: 4af78819a120806b277679c79bd6bd41f6d9800f5e7a481dde249bf1ec4af0d9 Item Level: 73 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 49 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full 27% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike 46% increased Armour during Effect

Rarity: RARE Pandemonium Hoof Wyvernscale Boots Armour: 311 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.1989 Evasion: 253 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.1882 Unique ID: 53c5bbf2fc133eb4858e22fa0a944d3d95089d8e26d8ce5857e4facf0d476bf1 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-R-B-R LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 37% increased Armour from Equipped Helmet and Gloves 4% increased Action Speed {fractured}+102 to maximum Life +50 to Strength +48 to Armour +28 to maximum Life +42% to Lightning Resistance +23% to Chaos Resistance {crafted}18% increased Movement Speed {crafted}9% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill
Rarity: NORMAL Short Bow Unique ID: df3beea71bb6ec302ecc42d8606113066b4df3530efc208da3aaecb3da79c370 Item Level: 50 Quality: 0 Sockets: G-R-G-G-G-R LevelReq: 5 Implicits: 0

Rarity: RARE Brood Whorl Amethyst Ring Unique ID: f4c4a16f7c703856c2ff10dd8ad00480f3cd6124e489ba9fa160ec066138dda4 Item Level: 82 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 1 +23% to Chaos Resistance Adds 3 to 59 Lightning Damage to Attacks +15% to all Elemental Resistances +45% to Lightning Resistance +28% to Chaos Resistance 22% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills {crafted}Non-Channelling Skills have -6 to Total Mana Cost

Rarity: MAGIC Physician's Jade Flask of the Gazelle Unique ID: 1c049a7863528bccd4b4ec0f07d191bbe20a88177cb15414bc36c41172722cb8 Item Level: 54 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 27 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full 20% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike 42% increased Evasion Rating during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Alarmed Divine Life Flask of Allaying Unique ID: b7209b2e67c3c93808bac0e2d577b52ea790d60b7db79daa42d3a9138966d41b Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 0 19% reduced Amount Recovered Instant Recovery when on Low Life Grants Immunity to Bleeding for 13 seconds if used while Bleeding Grants Immunity to Corrupted Blood for 13 seconds if used while affected by Corrupted Blood

Rarity: UNIQUE Ryslatha's Coil Studded Belt Unique ID: 35965b7e3ca465164928525573cd03ad73afb8eced54e3f6c1509916f3bcc72f Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 32 Implicits: 1 24% increased Stun Duration on Enemies +32 to Strength 46% more Maximum Physical Attack Damage 38% less Minimum Physical Attack Damage Adds 1 to 20 Physical Damage to Attacks +91 to maximum Life Gain 50 Life when you Stun an Enemy can buy any ryslatha that has >35% more attack damage and <35% less attack damage. You use Abrasive Catalysts to give it 20% quality too!

Rarity: UNIQUE Starforge Infernal Sword Unique ID: 38d9adfaf4c9e73c116c23f03fd1f97d3c420986bee5dc2bc48243841ab51177 Shaper Item Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R-R-G LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 30% increased Global Physical Damage 447% increased Physical Damage 5% increased Attack Speed +96 to maximum Life Your Physical Damage can Shock 20% increased Area of Effect for Attacks Deal no Elemental Damage

Rarity: MAGIC Doctor's Diamond Flask of Stinging Unique ID: a4fb20680986161679f98d8b2092e0ba6408dcf3bc52143fbaa225be98dc090d Item Level: 80 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 35 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full 24% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike 30% increased Critical Strike Chance during Effect

Rarity: MAGIC Doctor's Silver Flask of the Order Unique ID: 4db76cdd7e6e634b0cc8ffe98aba7d11118718d795ee45a97e57def02a1a6264 Item Level: 77 Quality: 20 LevelReq: 48 Implicits: 1 {crafted}Used when Charges reach full 25% chance to gain a Flask Charge when you deal a Critical Strike {crafted}Regenerate 3% of Life per second during Effect

Rarity: UNIQUE Watcher's Eye Prismatic Jewel Item Level: 85 Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 6% increased maximum Energy Shield 6% increased maximum Life 6% increased maximum Mana 0.94% of Damage leeched as Life while affected by Vitality Impales you inflict last 2 additional Hits while using Pride ~1-2 div watcher's eye. Once you get it you can remove one leech node (0.4% life & mana leech)

Rarity: UNIQUE Ancestral Vision Viridian Jewel Item Level: 86 Limited to: 1 Implicits: 0 +9 to Dexterity Modifiers to Chance to Suppress Spell Damage also apply to Chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments at 50% of their Value ~70-80c jewel, any dexterity is ok Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Plague Impaler Crimson Jewel Item Level: 63 Implicits: 0 4% increased Attack Speed 7% increased Attack Speed with Swords +18% to Critical Strike Multiplier with Two Handed Melee Weapons +12% to Melee Critical Strike Multiplier ~60c jewel, you need crit multi, AS is bonus!

Rarity: NORMAL Note Stone Axe Item Level: 5 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R Implicits: 0 You're looking to buy a Stone Axe from the Act 1 Town Vendor and you're also looking to buy ANY OTHER ITEM that has 3 red links (r-r-r)
Rarity: NORMAL Note Iron Greaves Armour: 11 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-G Implicits: 0 Any item that has 1 red and 1 green sockets linked will do
Rarity: NORMAL Note Greater Life Flask Quality: 20 LevelReq: 12 Implicits: 0 upgrade life flasks as you go through the campaign, once you get to divine life flask, that's when we roll it!

Rarity: NORMAL note Greater Mana Flask Quality: 20 LevelReq: 12 Implicits: 0 upgrade mana flask as you go, it's going to be needed a bit, until second half of the campaign, but just in case have one on!
Rarity: NORMAL Quicksilver Flask Quality: 20 LevelReq: 4 Implicits: 0

Rarity: RARE Read Note! Etched Greatsword Crafted: true Prefix: None Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: None Suffix: None Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R LevelReq: 22 Implicits: 1 {tags:attack}60% increased Global Accuracy Rating You can get any Two Handed Weapon as they all work with Sweep and you want to upgrade them with any other two handed weapon that has more damage. You can stack ANY damage whatsoever, but having as much physical as possible is best! This is all until level 51 where we buy Terminus Est for 1chaos off of trade. If you do not have 1 chaos by that time, continue with upgrades, BUT this time swap to a two handed SWORD as we're picking Sword nodes then!!!!!!!

Rarity: NORMAL note Agate Amulet LevelReq: 16 Implicits: 1 {tags:attribute}{range:0.5}+(16-24) to Strength and Intelligence this amulet adds the necessary stats for us! we later on add "to all attributes" as an additional attribute stat-stick!

Rarity: UNIQUE 1c Sword (Note) Terminus Est Tiger Sword Variant: Pre 2.6.0 Variant: Pre 3.11.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 3 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R G G LevelReq: 51 Implicits: 2 {variant:1}18% increased Global Accuracy Rating {variant:2,3}+360 to Accuracy Rating {variant:1}{range:0.5}(120-180)% increased Physical Damage {variant:2}{range:0.5}(220-260)% increased Physical Damage {variant:3}{range:0.5}(180-220)% increased Physical Damage 20% increased Attack Speed {variant:2,3}{range:0.5}(50-75)% increased Critical Strike Chance Gain 10 Mana per Enemy Killed 10% increased Movement Speed Gain a Frenzy Charge on Critical Strike This is the best sword until Starforge, which is the actual bis sword for the build. This one serves insanely well as it has a good crit chance, attack speed and gives us a frenzy charge on critical strike which makes them permanently on (and maxed!)

Rarity: RARE New Item Reaver Helmet Armour: 280 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}IncreasedLife4 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:1}FireResist4 Suffix: {range:1}ColdResist4 Suffix: {range:1}LightningResist4 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R LevelReq: 40 Implicits: 0 +69 to maximum Life +29% to Fire Resistance +29% to Cold Resistance +29% to Lightning Resistance

Rarity: RARE New Item Antique Gauntlets Armour: 185 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}IncreasedLife4 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:1}FireResist4 Suffix: {range:1}LightningResist4 Suffix: {range:1}ColdResist4 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-G B-G LevelReq: 39 Implicits: 0 +62 to maximum Life +29% to Fire Resistance +29% to Cold Resistance +29% to Lightning Resistance

Rarity: RARE New Item Plated Greaves Armour: 115 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}MovementVelocity3 Prefix: {range:0.5}IncreasedLife4 Prefix: None Suffix: {range:1}ColdResist4 Suffix: {range:1}LightningResist4 Suffix: {range:1}FireResist4 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-G-R-R LevelReq: 30 Implicits: 0 +62 to maximum Life +29% to Fire Resistance +29% to Cold Resistance +29% to Lightning Resistance 20% increased Movement Speed

Rarity: RARE New Item Lordly Plate Armour: 500 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}IncreasedLife6 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:1}ColdResist4 Suffix: {range:1}LightningResist4 Suffix: {range:1}FireResist4 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R LevelReq: 35 Implicits: 0 +92 to maximum Life +29% to Fire Resistance +29% to Cold Resistance +29% to Lightning Resistance

Rarity: RARE New Item Agate Amulet Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}IncreasedLife4 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.5}Intelligence5 Suffix: {range:0.5}Strength5 Suffix: None LevelReq: 35 Implicits: 1 {tags:attribute}{range:0.5}+(16-24) to Strength and Intelligence +30 to Strength +30 to Intelligence +62 to maximum Life

Rarity: UNIQUE 1c belt (note) Meginord's Girdle Heavy Belt Variant: Pre 2.0.0 Variant: Current Selected Variant: 2 LevelReq: 8 Implicits: 1 {tags:jewellery_attribute}{range:0.5}+(25-35) to Strength {tags:jewellery_attribute}+25 to Strength {tags:attack,physical_damage}{variant:1}Adds 10 to 20 Physical Damage to Attacks {tags:attack,physical_damage}{variant:2}Adds 5 to 15 Physical Damage to Attacks {tags:life}10% increased maximum Life {tags:jewellery_resistance}{range:0.5}+(10-20)% to Cold Resistance {tags:life}25% increased Flask Life Recovery rate either buy this belt or get any other belt with stats that you need to fill resistances to 75% (other than chaos resistance)

Rarity: RARE Statstick ring! New Item Two-Stone Ring (Fire/Lightning) Crafted: true Prefix: None Prefix: {range:1}IncreasedLife3 Prefix: None Suffix: {range:1}FireResist4 Suffix: {range:1}ColdResist4 Suffix: {range:1}LightningResist4 LevelReq: 30 Implicits: 1 {tags:elemental,fire,lightning,resistance}{range:0}+(12-16)% to Fire and Lightning Resistances +54 to maximum Life +29% to Fire Resistance +29% to Cold Resistance +29% to Lightning Resistance we use ring slots to fill in required stats, resistances, life and crafted modifier once you obtain it via Jun (non-channeling skills have -6/-7 to total mana cost)! {tags:resource,unveiled_mod,mana}{crafted}{range:0.5}Non-Channelling Skills have -(7-6) to Total Mana Cost

Rarity: RARE ~40c Corrupted body (Note) Beast Curtain Commander's Brigandine Armour: 367 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.62 Evasion: 448 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.62 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R-G-R LevelReq: 50 Implicits: 0 +16% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +35 to Strength +67 to Evasion Rating +124 to maximum Life +48% to Cold Resistance Reflects 17 Physical Damage to Melee Attackers We need at least 16% spell suppression to fill in the gaps for later! Get a chest with at least 16% SS and some resistance, do not overspend on the chest as we ONLY need 1 six-link and a 4/5 link with enlighten for auras!

Rarity: RARE ~30c Suppress Boots Vortex Stride Wyvernscale Boots Armour: 277 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.8387 Evasion: 277 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.8387 Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-G-R-R LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 0 +12% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +69 to maximum Life +45% to Fire Resistance +45% to Lightning Resistance {tags:unveiled_mod,speed}{crafted}{range:0.5}(18-20)% increased Movement Speed {tags:unveiled_mod,speed}{crafted}{range:0.5}(8-12)% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill

Rarity: RARE ~15c Statstick Gloves (note) Loath Claw Steelscale Gauntlets Armour: 90 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Evasion: 90 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Eater of Worlds Item Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: G-R G-B LevelReq: 36 Implicits: 1 {eater}+5% chance to Suppress Spell Damage Adds 3 to 5 Physical Damage to Attacks +48% to Fire Resistance +46% to Cold Resistance +28% to Lightning Resistance {tags:resource,life}{crafted}{range:0.5}+(41-55) to maximum Life Once you can afford lesser eldritch ichor, apply it until you hit the implicit "5% Chance to Suppress Spell Damage"

Rarity: RARE Attribute Statstick New Item Agate Amulet Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}IncreasedLife4 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:0.5}AllAttributes5 Suffix: {range:0.528}Intelligence7 Suffix: None LevelReq: 52 Implicits: 1 {tags:attribute}{range:0.476}+(16-24) to Strength and Intelligence +19 to all Attributes +40 to Intelligence +62 to maximum Life

Rarity: RARE Read Note!!! New Item Fluted Bascinet Armour: 227 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Evasion: 227 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Crafted: true Prefix: {range:1}IncreasedLife4 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:1}FireResist4 Suffix: {range:1}ColdResist4 Suffix: {range:0.151}ChanceToSuppressSpells4 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R LevelReq: 60 Implicits: 0 +11% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +69 to maximum Life +29% to Fire Resistance +29% to Cold Resistance you either want to fill in the stats for resistances, add spell suppress etc. Fill what you need with helmet/body armour/ gloves/boots as suppress is the most important thing that cannot be swapped out! Cheapest items that make you suppress capped and elemental resistance capped will suffice for start!

Rarity: RARE Crafted (note) Demon Shelter Haunted Bascinet Armour: 556 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.6173 Evasion: 590 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.6049 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 8% increased Mana Reservation Efficiency of Skills 22% reduced Mana Cost of Attacks {fractured}+46% to Cold Resistance +14% chance to Suppress Spell Damage +75 to Armour +104 to Evasion Rating +24 to maximum Life +24% to Chaos Resistance {crafted}+70 to maximum Life

Rarity: RARE Crafted (note) Dusk Shell Conquest Lamellar Armour: 1974 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.3247 Evasion: 1974 EvasionBasePercentile: 0.3247 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-R-R-R-R-R LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 Determination has 24% increased Aura Effect 12% increased effect of Non-Curse Auras from your Skills {fractured}+46% to Fire Resistance +21% chance to Suppress Spell Damage 117% increased Armour and Evasion +21% to Chaos Resistance 16% increased Stun and Block Recovery {crafted}25% chance to Avoid Elemental Ailments {crafted}23% chance to Avoid being Stunned

Rarity: RARE Crafted (note) Horror Idol Agate Amulet Item Level: 85 LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Allocates Frenetic +28 to Strength and Intelligence Quality (Attribute Modifiers): +20% {fractured}+40 to all Attributes 41% increased Global Critical Strike Chance 30% increased Evasion Rating +30 to maximum Mana +17% to all Elemental Resistances {crafted}+53 to maximum Life

Rarity: RARE Purchased Eagle Knot Amethyst Ring Item Level: 83 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Your Meteor Towers create Burning Ground for 3 seconds on Hit +23% to Chaos Resistance +61 to maximum Life 22% increased Rarity of Items found +13% to all Elemental Resistances +44% to Cold Resistance +32% to Lightning Resistance {crafted}Non-Channelling Skills have -7 to Total Mana Cost statstick ring to give us required resistances and life/crafted mod!

Rarity: RARE Purchased Brood Whorl Amethyst Ring Item Level: 82 LevelReq: 64 Implicits: 2 {crafted}Your Empowering Towers have 25% increased Effect +23% to Chaos Resistance Adds 3 to 59 Lightning Damage to Attacks +15% to all Elemental Resistances +45% to Lightning Resistance +28% to Chaos Resistance 22% increased Elemental Damage with Attack Skills {crafted}Non-Channelling Skills have -6 to Total Mana Cost same as the first ring, but lightning damage/ele dmg with attack skills are dead mods!!!! Get life if you can afford it!

Rarity: RARE Note New Item Dragonscale Boots Armour: 167 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Evasion: 167 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Crafted: true Prefix: {range:0.5}IncreasedLife4 Prefix: None Prefix: None Suffix: {range:1}ChaosResist3 Suffix: None Suffix: None Quality: 20 Sockets: G-R-B-R LevelReq: 65 Implicits: 0 +62 to maximum Life +20% to Chaos Resistance {tags:unveiled_mod,speed}{crafted}{range:0.5}(18-20)% increased Movement Speed {tags:unveiled_mod,speed}{crafted}{range:0.5}(8-12)% chance to gain Onslaught for 4 seconds on Kill Buy any boots that fill in life, chaos res and movement speed. Implicits won't matter as we're changing these with Ralakesh later!

Rarity: UNIQUE Starforge Infernal Sword Shaper Item Item Level: 87 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-R-R-R-R-G LevelReq: 67 Implicits: 1 30% increased Global Physical Damage 447% increased Physical Damage 5% increased Attack Speed +96 to maximum Life Your Physical Damage can Shock 20% increased Area of Effect for Attacks Deal no Elemental Damage Bis sword that's generally around 6-7 divines and it is way better than terminus est as it gives our phys damage shock! Bonus aoe is great too!

Rarity: UNIQUE Ralakesh's Impatience Riveted Boots Armour: 84 ArmourBasePercentile: 0.8333 Energy Shield: 18 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Item Level: 85 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-G-B-R LevelReq: 36 Implicits: 0 +18% to Cold Resistance +23% to Chaos Resistance Count as having maximum number of Endurance Charges Count as having maximum number of Frenzy Charges Count as having maximum number of Power Charges simple ethos: why make the effort, when you can simply mimic what others have? Can buy any ralakesh boots, corrupted is usually cheaper and you can change colors on a corrupted item via crafting bench and vaal orbs or you can use tainted chromatic orbs. Corrupted

Rarity: UNIQUE note Arn's Anguish Cloth Belt Item Level: 86 LevelReq: 68 Implicits: 1 Determination has 16% increased Aura Effect +647 to Armour 14% increased maximum Life +56% to Fire Resistance +1 to Maximum Endurance Charges Modifiers to Minimum Endurance Charges instead apply to Minimum Brutal Charges Maximum Brutal Charges is equal to Maximum Endurance Charges Gain Brutal Charges instead of Endurance Charges Bis belt for what we're doing (changing endurance charges to brutal charges and we're stacking frenzy charges because of our ascendancy that maxes out our endurance as well. With ralakesh, this makes it so we have every bonus, we just need to stack up brutal charges! Corrupted

Rarity: RARE Crafted (Note) Rift Vise Wyvernscale Gauntlets Armour: 564 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Evasion: 564 EvasionBasePercentile: 1 Searing Exarch Item Eater of Worlds Item Item Level: 86 Quality: 20 Sockets: B-G G-R LevelReq: 84 Implicits: 2 +6% chance to Suppress Spell Damage 9% increased Attack Speed {fractured}+46% to Lightning Resistance +14% chance to Suppress Spell Damage Adds 6 to 10 Physical Damage to Attacks 18% increased Attack Speed 99% increased Armour and Evasion {crafted}41% increased Damage while Leeching

Rarity: UNIQUE 3.26 Ralakesh's Impatience Riveted Boots Armour: 85 ArmourBasePercentile: 1 Energy Shield: 18 EnergyShieldBasePercentile: 1 Variant: Pre 3.19.0 Variant: Pre 3.23.0 Variant: Pre 3.24.0 Variant: Pre 3.26.0 Variant: Endurance Current Variant: Frenzy Current Variant: Power Current Selected Variant: 5 Quality: 20 Sockets: R-G-B-R LevelReq: 36 Implicits: 0 {range:0.5}+(15-25)% to Cold Resistance {range:0.5}+(15-25)% to Chaos Resistance {variant:1}20% increased Movement Speed {variant:2,3}30% increased Movement Speed {variant:5,6,7}{range:0.5}(15-25)% increased Movement Speed {variant:5,6,7}Corrupted Blood cannot be inflicted on you {variant:1}Gain a Frenzy, Endurance, or Power Charge once per second while you are Stationary {variant:1,2}Lose all Frenzy, Endurance, and Power Charges when you Move {variant:2}Minimum Endurance Charges equal to Maximum while stationary {variant:2}Minimum Frenzy Charges equal to Maximum while stationary {variant:2}Minimum Power Charges equal to Maximum while stationary {variant:3,4}Count as having maximum number of Endurance Charges {variant:3,4}Count as having maximum number of Frenzy Charges {variant:3,4}Count as having maximum number of Power Charges {variant:5}Count as having maximum number of Endurance Charges {variant:6}Count as having maximum number of Frenzy Charges {variant:7}Count as having maximum number of Power Charges

ItemSet.title: 2. Yellow Maps (Cluster And Supp on Gear!)
